{"dev":"concurrently -n convex,agent,expo -c blue,magenta,green --kill-others-on-fail \"npm:dev:convex\" \"npm:dev:agent\" \"npm:dev:expo\"","dev:remote":"concurrently -n convex,agent,expo -c blue,magenta,green --kill-others-on-fail \"npm:dev:convex\" \"npm:dev:agent\" \"npm:dev:expo:tunnel\"","dev:convex":"convex dev","dev:agent":"npm --prefix agent run dev","dev:expo":"expo start","dev:expo:tunnel":"expo start --tunnel","ios":"LANG=en_US.UTF-8 LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8 expo run:ios","ios:rebuild":"LANG=en_US.UTF-8 LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8 expo prebuild --platform ios --clean && LANG=en_US.UTF-8 LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8 expo run:ios","android:rebuild":"expo prebuild --platform android --clean && expo run:android","web":"expo start --web","format:check":"prettier --check .","format:fix":"prettier --write .","lint":"expo lint","typecheck":"tsc --noEmit","deploy:agent":"cd agent && lk agent deploy","reset-project":"node ./scripts/reset-project.js"}
